items.title: Doctors Urged to Ask About Herbal Remedies

items.title: At Discharge, Patients’ Medication Lists Rarely Shrink

items.title: Stick a Fork in Aspirin for Cancer Prevention in Over-70s
items.description: What does extended data from the ASPREE trial reveal about daily aspirin use in this population? Medscape Medical News

items.title: The Case for Continuous Glucose Monitoring in Pregnancy
items.description: Continuous glucose monitoring improves some outcomes for mothers and infants. Medscape Medical News
